records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you head north from here, past the forest, and go just a little farther...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you head north from here, past the forest, and go just a little farther...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you head north from here, past the forest, and go just a little farther...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There will be ruins that are not of this world. I learned about that place through another case.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There will be ruins that are not of this world. I learned about that place through another case.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There will be ruins that are not of this world. I learned about that place through another case.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know how long it has been there, or from which civilization...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know how long it has been there, or from which civilization...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know how long it has been there, or from which civilization...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I do know that it is a <color=#ffd34c>door</color> to another world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I do know that it is a <color=#ffd34c>door</color> to another world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I do know that it is a <color=#ffd34c>door</color> to another world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like Abberline said. There really is a ruin here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like Abberline said. There really is a ruin here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like Abberline said. There really is a ruin here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then does that mean this ruin is a gate to another world...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then does that mean this ruin is a gate to another world...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then does that mean this ruin is a gate to another world...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, you're wrong. This isn't running away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, you're wrong. This isn't running away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, you're wrong. This isn't running away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not clinging to the past anymore. It's moving toward the <color=#ffd34c>future</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not clinging to the past anymore. It's moving toward the <color=#ffd34c>future</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not clinging to the past anymore. It's moving toward the <color=#ffd34c>future</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't regret it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't regret it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't regret it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing I regret... is the helpless and unknown me. You...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing I regret... is the helpless and unknown me. You...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing I regret... is the helpless and unknown me. You...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You took on a grand role that didn't suit you, and yet you knew nothing. Didn't even try to understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You took on a grand role that didn't suit you, and yet you knew nothing. Didn't even try to understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You took on a grand role that didn't suit you, and yet you knew nothing. Didn't even try to understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know, don't you? Ignorance is a sin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know, don't you? Ignorance is a sin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know, don't you? Ignorance is a sin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd realized everything sooner, if you'd met everyone earlier, so much could've changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd realized everything sooner, if you'd met everyone earlier, so much could've changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd realized everything sooner, if you'd met everyone earlier, so much could've changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Had that been the case, our world might have seen a different conclusion...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Had that been the case, our world might have seen a different conclusion...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Had that been the case, our world might have seen a different conclusion...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just what that grand role that doesn't suit me is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just what that grand role that doesn't suit me is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just what that grand role that doesn't suit me is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What it was that I failed to realize, and what I failed to try to understand...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What it was that I failed to realize, and what I failed to try to understand...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What it was that I failed to realize, and what I failed to try to understand...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what kind of ending lies ahead of me, I don't really know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what kind of ending lies ahead of me, I don't really know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what kind of ending lies ahead of me, I don't really know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't want to live my whole life full of regret, deceiving myself like that woman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't want to live my whole life full of regret, deceiving myself like that woman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't want to live my whole life full of regret, deceiving myself like that woman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I trust you deeply.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I trust you deeply.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I trust you deeply.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter when or where, I believe you'll do well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter when or where, I believe you'll do well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter when or where, I believe you'll do well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because you are my true partner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because you are my true partner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because you are my true partner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That man, Abberline, believed in me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That man, Abberline, believed in me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That man, Abberline, believed in me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because that great detective willingly acknowledged someone like me as his <color=#ffd34c>partner</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because that great detective willingly acknowledged someone like me as his <color=#ffd34c>partner</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because that great detective willingly acknowledged someone like me as his <color=#ffd34c>partner</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I believe in Abberline too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I believe in Abberline too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I believe in Abberline too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe, and I move forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe, and I move forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe, and I move forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a strange space. The atmosphere is completely different from outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a strange space. The atmosphere is completely different from outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a strange space. The atmosphere is completely different from outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This suffocating feeling... It's like stepping into a shattered train car.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This suffocating feeling... It's like stepping into a shattered train car.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This suffocating feeling... It's like stepping into a shattered train car.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like Abberline said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like Abberline said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like Abberline said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This ruin is not from our world, at least.

records.m_Talk_FRA: This ruin is not from our world, at least.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's from a far more distant future than now...

records.m_Talk_FRA: That sound...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This... what is this black box...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: This... what is this black box...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be... the <color=#ffd34c>door</color> Abberline mentioned...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be... the <color=#ffd34c>door</color> Abberline mentioned...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaah...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaah...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaah...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just now... something clicked...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just now... something clicked...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just now... something clicked...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* *Sniffle*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, I'm sorry...! Because of me, you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, I'm sorry...! Because of me, you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, I'm sorry...! Because of me, you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: While... trying to protect me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: While... trying to protect me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: While... trying to protect me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I seeing memories I never experienced...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you have finally arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The prima donna who will bring this long story to an end.
